name: John Weaver, Chief Strategist
subject: Hillary is targeting John Kasich
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
Wow! Talk about the liberal media teaming up with Hillary Clinton
to attack John Kasich.

Yesterday, the liberal blog Media Matters (founded by
Hillary's top attack dog) teamed up with Ohio "journalists" to
attack John Kasich's conservative record.

Can you help us today by donating $25, $50, $100 or more
right now to help us get the resources to defend ourselves?

Why? Because Fox News is reporting that Hillary views
John Kasich as her greatest threat.

We can't let them off the hook. Will you chip in and
help?

Sincerely,

John Weaver
Chief Strategist

Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com

name: Rand Paul
subject: Fellow Conservative, need you on this (floor fight now!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

It appears some of my colleagues in the U.S. Senate would rather vote on handing out more of your hard-earned dollars to their cronies than stop them from flowing to Planned Parenthood.

I guess they agree with the national media that the American people should just get over the recent news that Planned Parenthood is routinely aborting babies, dismembering them and selling off their body parts for profit.

Fellow Conservative, I'm not about to let them get away with it. But I must be able to count on your IMMEDIATE action.

You see, this morning I received news that my amendment to next week's highway bill to stop all taxpayer funding for Planned Parenthood would NOT be voted on.

Instead, some of my colleagues would rather vote on the Export-Import Bank -- one of the biggest drivers of corruption and cronyism in Washington, D.C. -- and sweep my amendment under the rug.

As far as I'm concerned, this is flat-out unacceptable. And I'm not going to stand for it.

Instead, I'm prepared to use every Senate rule at my disposal to force my colleagues on record whether they like it or not.

Under Senate rules, if enough Senators are willing to stand with me and sign a petition demanding a vote, there will be no stopping you and me.

So won't you please call your U.S. Senators at **202-224-3121** and insist they "Stand with Rand" and then **[add your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor of my petition demanding a vote on defunding Planned Parenthood](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29289219:28098690746:m:1:879035888:AE200B361815F79327EEFA7FF7616C17:r)**?

And if possible, please agree to a generous gift of $20.16 to help me generate even more pressure.

Fellow Conservative, the very thought of our U.S. Government handing out $500 million of our hard-earned tax dollars to Planned Parenthood every year infuriates me.

Planned Parenthood deserves our scorn. Not our tax dollars.

Like most Americans, my jaw hit the floor when I saw the undercover video footage of Planned Parenthood's chief abortionist explaining how they harvest aborted babies' organs and sell them for profit.

One video even showed Planned Parenthood officials squabbling over the price of aborted baby parts because one official joked she wanted to buy a Lamborghini.

The more I learn about Planned Parenthood's racket, aborting unborn children and then selling off their organs, the more my head spins.

I'm not about to let Planned Parenthood off the hook. And I'm not about to let politicians and our media sweep this scandal under the rug.

But I'm counting on you to make sure your Senators stand with me.

This is showtime. There's no time to waste.

Please call your U.S. Senators at **202-224-3121** and **[agree to your most generous gift of $20.16 today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29289219:28098690746:m:1:879035888:AE200B361815F79327EEFA7FF7616C17:r)**.

Thank you in advance for your support.

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29289219:28098690746:m:1:879035888:AE200B361815F79327EEFA7FF7616C17:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29289220:28098690746:m:1:879035888:AE200B361815F79327EEFA7FF7616C17:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29289221:28098690746:m:1:879035888:AE200B361815F79327EEFA7FF7616C17:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29289222:28098690746:m:1:879035888:AE200B361815F79327EEFA7FF7616C17:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President
---

| Dear Friend,

As you know, **Brent Bozell** is one of the most respected and effective conservative movement leaders in the nation. He has long been at the forefront of the most important issues to conservatives across the country -- from defunding Obamacare, to opposing amnesty, to fighting for concessions on the debt ceiling before Republican leadership capitulated to the Democrats, and so much more.

Brent wants a leader who will unapologetically fight for conservative principles, and that's why [he's endorsing Ted Cruz for President](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLyx-2FfYGqyCM1A1cRZnLoHNvAfaEB-2BJhuQUae012qn4RW1WWP4Mihn17sXKzgjfQTrhQ-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFn4z00h8XzaPRCVerHI41GdgKQzRe0L-2B8QmmfC-2F4ADW0vjhyTyoLPDFeHCVYaryhz-2Fwxq8iIgGR8aYaNrxSp46i8y58GKOiyBs2cTXHlusrxOV2ZVlUjsbh9zbZnTU3S751PidZBPkG-2Fe3-2BVZor6v9-2FtNLkv6gcTf136PmHCvYqNcToOgShnhMby-2BuoDwTm4UtFnIyOtos0b7j6BOqOE7ffX5YHRTxtUlt3Nlq6pOgkYgdOA5Fw6BoiYtLKOk-2FUNGNXSeY7fLnaX-2FHQjdwxpElLiO8fvr0bSn338VkTBRxYWJ9BJmlh9yCx4DOawBWSX0dU7mAqng-2B8JIrzEQFLoRmHDDpwoZ-2FNF7FyMB-2FMmdOYW21TWhCO-2FjkPSowuMo7Lzk-3D):

[](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=TEeb5-2FMuQyoelyZpsAGcFEITa5b2hO7tCNBxkWy8-2BI0lEMYOtR5IqNM69aVt-2Bklu6aZPOnOOHlfU3dAcWgYDqCw-2BSljYgrzIlOPc22Fnh7ON4mLbM0xrKq5rqxuQxhnyacU8LwkAL4avk5Uzq0aUqQ-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFn4z00h8XzaPRCVerHI41GfPAXDkR9ujhfNHHPLp46epQakdK-2FWqeD9r6Zdosg5qJLBWO7QYM08V4VT4sAaI0QAjQZKbAwOIY3w0N498mgqgiU7SCSI3uqRbhcyaJ9Op5BAshh2bpr1DlSfmkdgAwEbHoA2D0IckuEPJWarQYtywHzEjzo0S6odQG9TZXrICn46gJKUJS0CTLFIoC-2B95zKTQU3Z9YoddXDGMao-2B60Gnsls9KzsUVhH0Qf8j-2FaGTrAZ7pN6yS1vIPwT0LO61ib4-2FQoeVvLuoem5LGiLr3Pb103JRk1YfiAbvnbv-2FLUbj7kBBH7Ycv-2BuVcIGAkpX5MXzSPYsrrP6QquasSy6ON2gyDbhxJbxDh5cTc-2FiE5LcGpI-3D)[](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=L467dBYxdPzJCnZE6nvefn5xA1ugkEITbieh-2F0IcKTiDEowybNWoOhSk6VD3GMk78g9qLn-2Fn7itQmhalUHVb7tX-2B1QbMKZ-2FYcLgzw1SbaRBMYQ5aBRX1x8jOQ2mUywetv589Sq-2FcrCYhef-2Flvkgp3gwOyicwxtB6bpgKiQnU9ecV4rzHeWzMW9Q9qZCItyh9lwzh-2B-2BDURy-2BDAwPTLDPp1hZlFqCPuFhjUQ8kmRqhg-2BLA9acM-2BZbZCSsTLp5LcCEVaGC5q9twjwCDjzTFfRGNNw-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFn4z00h8XzaPRCVerHI41GZutuk-2BmKWQdmpQXCQrflWKVU3tfeHtcXuOpVFBSXsEItEffBdPnMMAQp7TTHDFGOOsCojhREH7lSogkqMO2clTLJKhfzwWuS-2BUOQ30VR9Qu7XMQ5mQ3pypc1RcLExycIriPOO2VIbrWW8dMTtnCY0kBOICjuLQAELB6uSPy-2FJbLzCBUHqC2NGG4-2FjztvfbfSLAM6rIq96xfkWZvwUXT1KxzDx5W-2FPNL7HoOkHYqf1gKggBr38-2BU2DOYuc9CE0PQ5WfDoRRwiQwVTyO17g0Io-2FRpAKZ3CJb17SIVaWmrS0sMJLK8XumJi9GYP2ja6gvQygkhV-2Bc2wGgf53v427yZYo8LEHM-2BupEECocNgr2Dhtd8-3D)
In his endorsement video, Brent said:
_Today I wholeheartedly endorse Ted Cruz for President of the United States and urge all conservatives nationwide to rally behind Ted immediately.

The Republican Party establishment is counting on conservatives being divided so that they can again nominate a moderate, do-nothing candidate.

Make no mistake: If the Republican Party repeats what it has done the last two presidential elections, Republicans will lose. I guarantee it.

On the other hand, if we nominate a principled, passionate conservative America can count on to restore her greatness, there will be an outpouring of support.

We need a courageous conservative who tells the truth and does what he promises.

We need to nominate an inspiring leader who has proven he is willing to take on the Washington Cartel and buck the political establishment of both parties.

We need a leader who will win, and reignite the promise of America.

There are some good conservatives running for president, but we need more than a campaign conservative - we need a consistent conservative who has led the fights important to us.

**Ted Cruz is this leader**.

I support Ted Cruz for President unconditionally and enthusiastically, and [**urge you to log on to tedcruz.org and join the team today**](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLyw7V1fzYSaxJ6cLzi5NiorA-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFn4z00h8XzaPRCVerHI41GZU-2F-2BWZ2AT2nDhIwVUZGfKkzwXF6MogXSb6sJPYfduF3fSsTKjvHWHOg8U-2Bf6aknzNZe2342SrZSLGehFV40PDD8Aijtda7PN9Ty4R6rYo9VDPT0KpSXwTKOHIeD8sEMTpCsA6w3A-2BwY2Ek99jeTskDEb2p0MOVEa13DUpl7WGgDNicxzD8y4dpFf8HMEjxtJD5k7ka6JFOwKvplFWKba5KLsLX27R39i29xVFWin-2BPqrOrOkgr-2F8Yks7K7uFmyvpLN78UX8XKPH1IiN5ks62QwZ5BxvVBogpIueu8gmEJsLSKZ1VIHlA4G9KYI1nvS4qAiIov7SGoSLcgD6WzrPR-2BKKA8kR5pDzjKjrUhyYR-2FgU-3D)._
I hope you'll help spread the word about this exciting endorsement on [Facebook](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=TEeb5-2FMuQyoelyZpsAGcFEITa5b2hO7tCNBxkWy8-2BI0lEMYOtR5IqNM69aVt-2Bklu6aZPOnOOHlfU3dAcWgYDqCw-2BSljYgrzIlOPc22Fnh7ON4mLbM0xrKq5rqxuQxhnyacU8LwkAL4avk5Uzq0aUqQ-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFn4z00h8XzaPRCVerHI41G2VMDZr05Cphce06AT0Z1S4RIY6SIsemohioDM73mA0diWctjm8YTPvcwEdX44hosIZeRUAc-2BKbpwmIL4dFfofmjX9loIV3Ok-2BNIGVOVt58Jz5-2Bstmsgc5ctZdHBLADzCVoJNt2fofQy95vGQfCGgNMkZAIKSBh6prY87ChEz-2BCEXYkaXA63JbTlBJhbXppYW1etYwtZI63J27AIYqsfgbcav2PuRs-2Fn9sGLBgBFepww376kikVeMDihavtFoVdT2J-2BBjvOxSixxho90nr1OTCWD1bBY7p-2BV0cBE8eTivsugONoG135axYeq-2FVh2vi8WAB0gTdKU0rj-2FwQCnkS1GB2Mt3d8z7amwbBblrMI0uiaQ-3D) and [Twitter](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=L467dBYxdPzJCnZE6nvefn5xA1ugkEITbieh-2F0IcKTjywO2Pcvbw37McDqb56UbCb70uvh5X6bJ7yd8yCsuFUY4jFRKTg5FI0ffBKKsVaftHlho-2Bff-2FJS9JqnNE6NMXbdg-2Fiw8XG6zZj6x9elawG3BOBcKsXkOvPAck4846zNNPV-2FLE8UzASClseCHljMOTTuvWtIlh5CbjtjPzhEsHr336RC0N0N4qyJ3ZNWzH9EKc5uykcUfdKgeWaS98PZCdc9I7HeSQ9vh-2FM89rghowjxDsvrxPwyvbtTCNIDxGltijn7c-2Bga7xg3AF4zjwrS5h9_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFn4z00h8XzaPRCVerHI41G8Y6IqNy6UqKTNKPmNH40VZpNUTHTeW2rBAz013n2xpdpiLh8MsRxpmI2FTnAU4Mdrk29dhLPyyJeqZbrW9hstO-2BU-2BMv9divTX0bb-2BTMgUSF1JxLxKvSDt6OuQXE02qm09L13eA-2FvleHgTachHXLLaXaoTfsjtCaY1MSL76JhGLBNSn6dNLXS6vPrhLXNqtGxZlhYcWvS8m-2B5K2XDbkRXaJRArpsty3sIaJ44RMVe359WNLGuny7sxsqueS4Xm-2FeAAznSvK21YI3I8d25D9C3Tn3dZcKKh7RMnLQ5m-2BN6Rb0zC-2Bwngp-2BXfBjYoZUfbY8gItgkVSZKJAYnm497e1QNQQS135XxaJeiboKIxkk70Bc-3D).
For Liberty,

Mark Campbell
National Political Director
Cruz for President
P.S. As a reminder, Ted will be hosting a rally for religious liberty in Des Moines, Iowa, on Friday, August 21st, and if you're in the area, we'd love to have you there. [**Please click here to RSVP**](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy09v5edMMZm9mVbjZI6SnjxpComyEnH7uoVag5waV1UD_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFn4z00h8XzaPRCVerHI41GLWg3DamNKhTXWq8ShD8ZgJr95DmM6n6A9GsGxXCAKiu4EHHl13kHhkRsNCr-2FS0S-2F-2FX6Rnp5xJYOn2XS7y1MAHrGxbJ9qN0eH2IxJOb8FIv8Sr1Sm4MqmxnYr8pgKyknSd-2B2pXs-2Bk3a-2BPJaB9JgYxP8S33fSoiktkpXbhWLMqHIVVly0kxQpdjFTGkNE3fTUVUsO8If5L260dVrH7DqEvxu8cmZBcm1tfgwzWcwnT3y2Hox1x586liGBE8aTYa7Q39dMKHYCfdASHUHJbkNI0d46yqjhdjzEyJte-2FN1ErN1gbUeicHJOB5OHcdUI8RGD2cSkIXio2RYOVI2klIt8vEHVrLg-2BP4NaMXEyo-2F166ns0-3D).

clean_body: | | | | | Email not displaying correctly? in your browser | | Dear Friend, As you know, Brent Bozell is one of the most respected and effective conservative movement leaders in the nation. He has long been at the forefront of the most important issues to conservatives across the country -- from defunding Obamacare, to opposing amnesty, to fighting for concessions on the debt ceiling before Republican leadership capitulated to the Democrats, and so much more. Brent wants a leader who will unapologetically fight for conservative principles, and that's why : In his endorsement video, Brent said: Today I wholeheartedly endorse Ted Cruz for President of the United States and urge all conservatives nationwide to rally behind Ted immediately. The Republican Party establishment is counting on conservatives being divided so that they can again nominate a moderate, do-nothing candidate. Make no mistake: If the Republican Party repeats what it has done the last two presidential elections, Republicans will lose. I guarantee it. On the other hand, if we nominate a principled, passionate conservative America can count on to restore her greatness, there will be an outpouring of support. We need a courageous conservative who tells the truth and does what he promises. We need to nominate an inspiring leader who has proven he is willing to take on the Washington Cartel and buck the political establishment of both parties. We need a leader who will win, and reignite the promise of America. There are some good conservatives running for president, but we need more than a campaign conservative - we need a consistent conservative who has led the fights important to us. Ted Cruz is this leader. I support Ted Cruz for President unconditionally and enthusiastically, and . I hope you'll help spread the word about this exciting endorsement on and . For Liberty, Mark Campbell National Political Director Cruz for President P.S. As a reminder, Ted will be hosting a rally for religious liberty in Des Moines, Iowa, on Friday, August 21st, and if you're in the area, we'd love to have you there. . | Paid for by Cruz for President www.tedcruz.org | To unsubscribe please click | Mark Campbell P.O. Box 25376, Houston, TX, 77265 ---|---

name: Doug Stafford
subject: Rand is not backing down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

This morning, Rand received news that his amendment to the highway bill to stop all taxpayer funding for Planned Parenthood would NOT be voted on!

But Rand is not backing down.

And earlier today he filed a petition that if enough Senators are willing to Stand with Rand and sign a petition demanding a vote, there will be no stopping him. But time is running out and he's counting on your help. Here's what you can do:

1) Call your U.S. Senators at **202-224-3121** and insist they "Stand with Rand" and defund Planned Parenthood;

2.) **[Click HERE to add your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor to Rand's petition demanding Congress immediately vote on Rand's amendment to defund Planned Parenthood](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29291461:28101988335:m:1:879035888:612C8C00BBDC6CE8914E79DAA5130274:r)** ;

3.) **[Chip in a contribution of $20.16 to help Rand mobilize grassroots Americans](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29291461:28101988335:m:1:879035888:612C8C00BBDC6CE8914E79DAA5130274:r)** to turn up the heat on their Senators to Stand with Rand and sign his petition to defund Planned Parenthood.

Fellow Conservative, the very thought of our U.S. Government handing out $500 million of our hard-earned tax dollars to Planned Parenthood every year is infuriating.

You and I must not allow Congress to let Planned Parenthood off the hook and sweep this scandal under the rug.

But the Senate comes back in on Sunday. So there's no time to waste.

Please call your U.S. Senators at **202-224-3121** and **[agree to your most generous gift of $20.16 today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29291461:28101988335:m:1:879035888:612C8C00BBDC6CE8914E79DAA5130274:r)**.

\-- Doug Stafford
Chief Strategist

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29291461:28101988335:m:1:879035888:612C8C00BBDC6CE8914E79DAA5130274:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29291462:28101988335:m:1:879035888:612C8C00BBDC6CE8914E79DAA5130274:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29291463:28101988335:m:1:879035888:612C8C00BBDC6CE8914E79DAA5130274:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29291464:28101988335:m:1:879035888:612C8C00BBDC6CE8914E79DAA5130274:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President
---

name: Josh Wolf, MurphyForFlorida.com
subject: FWD: Protect Medicare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friend -- I wanted to make sure you saw Patrick's email from yesterday. We've had 4,503 people sign on to denounce Jeb Bush. [**Will you click to autosign?**](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2014/738133e4/393082f9/7f90e163/2618162064/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-medicare?refcode=ema_2015-07-24_b1_jw") Thanks, Josh \-- Begin Forwarded Message -- From: Patrick Murphy
Date: Thursday, July 23, 2015
Subject: Protect Medicare Friend -- Today, Jeb Bush announced that he wants to "phase out" Medicare. Yes, you read that right. Jeb Bush wants to "phase out" a vital program that helps millions of Americans, including a good portion of Floridians as well. [**Join me: Denounce Jeb Bush's plan to "phase out" Medicare right now.**](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2014/738133e4/393082f9/7f90e163/2618162064/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-medicare?refcode=ema_2015-07-24_b1_jw") I'm running for Senate because I want to stand up for Florida. And as Senator, I pledge to protect Social Security and Medicare. Millions of Floridians have paid into these programs and count on them every day. We want our elected officials to stand with seniors, not against them. Florida's seniors need elected officials who will stand up for them and the programs they count on. With your help, I know we can continue to fight for the needs of Floridians, both in Washington and in Florida. I have always counted on you before, and am grateful to have you standing with me today. [**Stand with me: Denounce Jeb Bush's plan to "phase out" Medicare right now.**](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2014/738133e4/393082f9/7f90e163/2618162064/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-medicare?refcode=ema_2015-07-24_b1_jw") Patrick | **[TAKE ACTION »](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2014/738133e4/393082f9/7f90e163/2618162064/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-medicare?refcode=ema_2015-07-24_b1_jw")**
---

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: All these years later
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend,

Next week marks the 50th anniversary of the historic day when President Lyndon B. Johnson signed Medicare into law.
[](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eac/70cdc2ba/479424f5/394c60a/1649665506/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTA2In0=/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-up-for-medicare-/wtt?source=em072415&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em072415")
All these years later, Medicare is woven into the fabric of our nation -- and that's because, as you and I know, Medicare works. It saves lives. So it is deeply disturbing that Republican politicians are again trying to dismantle this successful program. Just yesterday, Jeb Bush appeared at a gathering of the Koch brothers-funded Americans for Prosperity and called for "phasing out" Medicare going forward.

I am proud to have led the fight against the Republican budget plan from Rep. Paul Ryan that would phase out Medicare by turning it into a voucher plan that would significantly increase the risks and costs to seniors.

Effectiveness matters when it comes to protecting seniors' benefits, and as the lead Democrat on the Budget Committee we've made sure that the Republicans have never succeeded in their plans to end Medicare as we know it.

One day they are re-opening the prescription drug donut hole, and the next day they are imposing co-pays for basic preventative care and trying to turn Medicare into a voucher program. We have beaten back these attacks in the past, and with your help, we will defeat their plan to "phase it out" in the future.

**[Join me on Medicare's 50th anniversary and add your name to say that Medicare is a promise we must keep.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eac/70cdc2ba/479424f5/394c606/1649665506/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTA2In0=/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-up-for-medicare-/wtt?source=em072415&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Join+me+on+Medicarersquos+50th+anniversa&utm_campaign=em072415")**

Before Medicare, nearly half of all seniors in this country had no health insurance. Think about that: millions of older Americans went without a regular doctor, hospital care, or access to life-saving prescription drugs. Today, nearly everyone over age 65 enjoys health care coverage thanks to Medicare, including over 800,000 seniors right here in Maryland.

As Maryland's next U.S. senator, I'll continue to be an effective advocate for our seniors -- because it's clear the Republican attacks on Medicare aren't going to end.

We all want our kids and grandkids to celebrate Medicare's 100th anniversary, which is why we must stand together today and send a strong message that we're committed to protecting Medicare from Republican attacks. Will you join me? **[Add your name to say that Medicare is a promise we must keep.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eac/70cdc2ba/479424f5/394c602/1649665506/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTA2In0=/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-up-for-medicare-/wtt?source=em072415&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+to+say+that+Medicare+is+a+&utm_campaign=em072415")**

Thanks,

Chris

| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eac/70cdc2ba/479424f5/394c61f/1649665506/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em072415&source=em072415") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.
